fields.name: Journal Template Name
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the name of the journal template.
Choose the field to select the name of the journal template that is associated with this batch.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of this resource journal.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of this batch.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reason code, a supplementary source code that enables you to trace the entry.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series from which entry or record numbers are assigned to new entries or records.

fields.name: Posting No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code used to assign document numbers to ledger entries that are posted from this journal batch.

fields.name: Recurring
fields.tooltip:
Specifies if the resource journal template is a recurring journal.
Recurring journals can be useful when you have entries that must be posted periodically with few or no changes.

Additional Information

In a recurring journal, entries that will be posted regularly only need to be entered once. The accounts, dimensions, and dimension values that you enter remain in the journal after posting. If any adjustments are necessary, you can make them with each posting.

fields.name: No. of Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of lines in this journal batch.
